humanitix.title: Humanitix — purchase confirmation
humanitix.note: Replaces the Thanks embed iframe inside the partner's #thanks-widget slot

oztix.title: Oztix — order confirmation
oztix.note: Replaces the Thanks embed iframe inside #thanks-widget; its host .section padding reduced to 1px

ebay.title: eBay — checkout success
ebay.note: Partner placement div — widget hidden, carousel mounted inside; breaks out of the col-lg-9 to full container width on large screens

humanitix-light.title: Humanitix — light theme
humanitix-light.note: Replaces the Thanks embed iframe inside the partner's #thanks-widget slot
